mapper.sql: select fe.id, fe.activity_id, fe.activity_candidate_id, r.id as result_agg_id, fe.final_result, fe.confirm_status, fe.confirmed_by, fe.confirmed_at, fe.signed_by, fe.signature_status, fe.confirm_remark, fe.create_by, fe.create_time, fe.update_by, fe.update_time, ac.import_seq, ac.name as candidate_name, ac.id_card, ac.company, ac.department, ac.third_level_department, ac.position, ac.current_level, ac.applied_level, ac.fixed_type, r.vote_PASS_count, r.vote_REJECT_count, r.total_votes, r.rank_no, r.final_result as calculated_result from FinalEvaluation fe left join ActivityCandidate ac on ac.id = fe.activity_candidate_id left join ResultAgg r on r.activity_id = fe.activity_id and r.activity_candidate_id = fe.activity_candidate_id and r.stat_scope = 'CANDIDATE_GROUP'
mapper.select: select count(1) from FinalEvaluation where activity_id = #{activityId}
mapper.insert: insert into FinalEvaluation(activity_id, activity_candidate_id, final_result, confirm_status, confirmed_by, confirmed_at, signed_by, signature_status, confirm_remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{activityId}, #{activityCandidateId}, #{finalResult}, #{confirmStatus}, #{confirmedBy}, #{confirmedAt}, #{signedBy}, #{signatureStatus}, #{confirmRemark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from FinalEvaluation where id in #{id}
